# BRIEF

## User-Facing Goal

Users can personalize the public hosted page background without changing the uploaded images.

## Success Criteria

- Existing projects keep the current-looking default background.
- New and existing project settings expose a color picker and hex input.
- Saving project settings persists the background color.
- Public pages render with the saved background color.

## UX Notes

Use a simple color input plus hex field to keep the control understandable.

## Risks Or Tradeoffs

Very light or bright colors may affect page/card contrast, but only the page background changes in this pass.
